fundingAccountId.description: UUID of the sender's funding account where funds are credited to

omnibusVirtualAccountId.description: UUID of the omnibus virtual account

paymentsUserExternalUUID.description: UUID of the user who created the disbursement

paymentsUserName.description: user name who created the disbursement

amount.description: Dollar amount of the disbursement times 100. Ex: $100.51 = 10051

updatedAt.description: Time this disbursement was last updated

payouts.description: List of payouts in the disbursement. Each payout represents a payment to a business for an invoice.

receivingExternalAccountId.description: UUID receiver's external account where funds are credited to

receivingExternalAccountLastFour.description: Last four digits of receiver's bank account number

disbursementId.description: UUID of the disbursement this payout belongs to

invoiceId.description: ID of the invoice this payout belongs to

subtierRequisitionId.description: ID of the subtier requisition (present when receivingEntityType is SUBTIER)

amount.description: Dollar amount of the invoice/payout times 100. Ex: $100.51 = 10051

earlyPayFeeAmount.description: Early pay fee amount in cents

partialPayment.description: Whether this is a partial payment

partialPaymentSetAt.description: Time when partial payment was set

partialPaymentSetByUserExternalUuid.description: UUID of user who set partial payment

partialPaymentSetByUsername.description: Name of user who set partial payment

metadata.description: information related to project and contract details.

updatedAt.description: Time this payout was last updated

authorizedByPaymentsUserExternalUUID.description: UUID of the user who authorized the disbursement

authorizedByPaymentsUserName.description: User name who authorized the disbursement

workflowEnabled.description: Indicates whether workflows is enabled for the disbursement or not

cancelledByUserExternalUuid.description: External UUID of the user who cancelled the disbursement

cancelledByUserName.description: Name of the user who cancelled the disbursement
